mission.title: knative: Support for NodeSelector and Tolerations.
mission.description:
Fixes #1816
Closes #1831

Took this over from @krancour to rebase to master and push it through.

## Proposed Changes
* Support for nodeSelector and tolerations in revision spec

**Release Note**
